subcodes.title: Words to a socialist, spoken on 1912-06-01
subcodes.first_line: Tell the socialists that sharing of property and land in this mortal world is the source of strife and warfare but sharing and inheritance in the Kingdom is the cause of love and unity.
subcodes.first_line_orig: باشتراکیون بگو اشتراک در اموال و اراضی اینعالم فانی سبب نزاع و جدال است اما اشتراک و وراثت ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @wealth inequality and its moderation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
